mapper.sql: BASE_DAY, CONT_NO, CONT_STAT_GB_CD, ORG_CD, BRCH_CD, TOTAL_ISU_PT, TOTAL_ISU_CNT, TOTAL_USE_PT, TOTAL_USE_CNT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_cont_stat
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into t_cont_stat (BASE_DAY, CONT_NO, CONT_STAT_GB_CD, ORG_CD, BRCH_CD, TOTAL_ISU_PT, TOTAL_ISU_CNT, TOTAL_USE_PT, TOTAL_USE_CNT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT) values (#{baseDay,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contStatGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalIsuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalIsuCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalUsePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalUseCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_cont_stat
BASE_DAY,
CONT_NO,
CONT_STAT_GB_CD,
ORG_CD,
BRCH_CD,
TOTAL_ISU_PT,
TOTAL_ISU_CNT,
TOTAL_USE_PT,
TOTAL_USE_CNT,
REG_USER_ID,
REG_DT,
LAST_MOD_USER_ID,
LAST_MOD_DT,
#{baseDay,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contStatGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{totalIsuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{totalIsuCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{totalUsePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{totalUseCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_cont_stat
BASE_DAY = #{row.baseDay,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_STAT_GB_CD = #{row.contStatGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_CD = #{row.orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRCH_CD = #{row.brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TOTAL_ISU_PT = #{row.totalIsuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TOTAL_ISU_CNT = #{row.totalIsuCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TOTAL_USE_PT = #{row.totalUsePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TOTAL_USE_CNT = #{row.totalUseCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update t_cont_stat set BASE_DAY = #{row.baseDay,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_STAT_GB_CD = #{row.contStatGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_CD = #{row.orgCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRCH_CD = #{row.brchCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TOTAL_ISU_PT = #{row.totalIsuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TOTAL_ISU_CNT = #{row.totalIsuCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TOTAL_USE_PT = #{row.totalUsePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TOTAL_USE_CNT = #{row.totalUseCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
